name: Loss of firmness & elasticity
dek: Three molecules genuinely move dermal elasticity over a 12-month timeline. Most of the rest is humectant theatre. The category with the worst signal-to-marketing ratio in skincare, which is saying something.
bottom: Elasticity restoration is a multi-year project. Anyone selling you a 6-week firming serum is selling marketing, not endpoints. The boring stack outperforms in 18 months — and humectant peptide moisturisers do not.

triggers.k: Skin slow to recoil after pinch test
triggers.n: The clinical sign. Pinch the back of the hand for 5 seconds; recoil should be immediate. Delay = elastosis.
Volume loss + skin laxity. The folds are partly anatomical, partly elasticity-driven.
Mid-face descent meets jawline laxity. Topicals will not address this; energy devices and threads might.

triggers.k: Crepe-paper texture on neck and décolleté
triggers.n: Sun damage + collagen loss. The neck is often 5–10 years 'older' than the face if SPF was face-only.

ingredients.name: Tretinoin 0.025–0.05%
ingredients.evidence: 12-month dermal collagen endpoints. The reference topical for true elasticity.

ingredients.name: Ascorbic acid 15–20%
ingredients.evidence: Required for collagen cross-linking. AM, under SPF.

ingredients.name: Peptide complexes (Matrixyl 3000)
ingredients.evidence: Modest 12-week endpoints. Useful adjunct, not standalone.

ingredients.name: RF microneedling (clinic)
ingredients.evidence: 3–4 sessions; the procedural standard for true elasticity restoration.

ingredients.name: Ultherapy / HIFU (clinic)
ingredients.evidence: Targets SMAS. Useful for early jawline laxity, not for textural concerns.

ingredients.name: Sunscreen SPF 50+ daily
ingredients.evidence: The single highest-leverage intervention. Photoaging is 80%+ of visible aging.

phases.b: Vitamin C 15% AM under broad-spectrum SPF 50+. Two finger-lengths, every morning, including weekends.
Tretinoin 0.025% nightly with ceramide buffer. The 12-week ramp matters more than the strength.
Add RF microneedling annually. HIFU for early jawline laxity. Topicals continue indefinitely.
